title: coffeepixel
description: coffeepixel modpack where players can explore the vast world of Tectonic, level up there skills, adventure into dungeons and loot varies of chest's with the lootz mod or send a tpa request to your friends.
body:
## coffeepixel

where players can explore the vast world of Regions Unexplored, level up there skills, adventure into dungeons and loot varies of chest's with the lootz mod or send a tpa request to your friends. We also got Proximity Voice Chat too make the game more entertaining for Content Creators.


### Features

       Ad Astra
       Create & AE 2
       345+ Mods
       Skill Tree, RPG Origins, Lootz
       Tons of Dungeons & Mine Cells.
       End Remastered, BetterEnd & BetterNether.                                                                                    

### Recommended 
    Use 8gbs
    When running the modpack So your game doesn't crash or lag out!. 
    For Servers use 6-8gbs

### Supported

      ✅ Linux
      ✅ Mac
      ✅ Windows
